category_sources: source_facts.description says ovsx is the command-line interface for Eclipse Open VSX; official OpenVSX repository describes Open VSX as an open-source VS Code extension registry.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ovsx; official OpenVSX repository describes the ovsx command-line tool.
docs_sources: Official OpenVSX GitHub wiki is referenced by the official repository for documentation; README provides official project overview.
repo_sources: Official OpenVSX GitHub repository states the project moved from eclipse/openvsx to eclipse-openvsx/openvsx; npm package metadata links the OpenVSX repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Eclipse Open VSX CLI; official repository describes publishing extensions and the Open VSX registry.
